name: Thyme-Lemon Zest Herb Paste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or blender, blend the shallots, almonds, lemon peel, thyme, parsley, and chives.
2. Mix in the salt and white pepper. Slowly drizzle in the olive oil while the blade is turning.
3. Transfer to tempered glass jars and store in the refrigerator (8-10 weeks) or freezer for up to a year.
